errors.description: Tenant does not hold `sports_seasons` entitlement. Small tier is locked out entirely; response includes tier + upgrade path.
Reached the `season_slot` per-calendar-year cap for this tenant (Small=0, Medium=4/year, Enterprise=null). Response includes tier + used + cap + suggested year to reallocate.
has_playoffs=true attempted without the `season_playoffs` entitlement (Enterprise-only). Response suggests either upgrading OR creating a second Season for the playoff period.
allows_late_registration=true attempted without the `season_late_registration` entitlement (Medium + Enterprise).
sport_key set on a tenant that lacks `season_sport_scoping` (Enterprise-only). Response suggests either upgrading OR leaving sport_key null (season is sport-agnostic).
start_date >= end_date. A Season must span at least one day.
registration_opens_at >= registration_closes_at. When both are set, opens must precede closes.
registration_closes_at > start_date + 30 days. Registration must close reasonably before the season begins (30-day grace covers legitimate late-start seasons; anything beyond is a data-entry error).
late_registration_ends_at <= registration_closes_at. The late window must open AFTER the standard registration_closes_at.

allows_late_registration=true supplied without late_registration_fee_cents > 0. Late registration must charge a surcharge (otherwise it's just… registration; the tenant should extend registration_closes_at instead).
has_playoffs=true supplied without playoff_starts_at. When playoffs are enabled the start must be set (playoff_ends_at may remain null — unbounded).

playoff_starts_at falls outside [start_date, end_date]. Playoffs are a sub-phase of the Season; they cannot extend past the Season boundary. (A tenant that legitimately wants a post-Season playoff period should model it as a separate Season with season_type='custom'.)
playoff_ends_at either precedes playoff_starts_at OR falls after Season.end_date.
Attempted to transition Season.status to 'playoffs' when Season.has_playoffs=false. Enable playoffs first via PATCH /{season} with has_playoffs=true + playoff_starts_at.
branch_id set but organization_id null. A branch-scoped season must also carry the branch's organization_id — branches always belong to an org.
The supplied branch_id belongs to a different organization than the supplied organization_id.
Cross-tenant FK smuggling attempt — the supplied organization_id belongs to a different tenant. Security-relevant, logged with actor + tenant + attempted org + IP.
Cross-tenant FK smuggling attempt — the supplied branch_id belongs to a different tenant. Security-relevant.
Cannot create or promote a season under an archived organization. Restore the org first or scope the season differently.
Cannot create a season for a branch that is closed or archived.

Attempted to create a Season directly with status IN (in_progress, playoffs, completed, archived). Only planned + registration_open are valid initial states; every downstream transition is owned by RollSeasonPhaseJob or the explicit action route.

Attempted a status transition that isn't in the state machine (e.g. archived -> in_progress directly; or completed -> registration_open). Response includes the valid transitions from the current status.

Cannot flip is_current=false when this is the only is_current=true row in its scope tuple. Promote another Season to current first, OR pass `--force-no-current` on the CLI / `?force_no_current=true` on the HTTP surface to intentionally leave the tuple current-less.
Cannot set is_current=true on an archived Season. Restore first.
The Season is is_current=true in its scope tuple. Promote another Season to current first, then archive this one.
Attempted to archive a Season that hasn't been completed. Complete first via POST /{season}/complete OR wait for automated completion at end_date.

Cannot archive a Season while active enrollments reference it. Response includes the reference counts (Team.season_id, AthleteEnrollment.season_id, Event.season_id, Session.season_id) + suggests re-enrolling to a different Season or waiting for the enrollments to complete.

Attempted to change sport_key on a Season with status IN (in_progress, playoffs, completed, archived). Critical severity — a mid-season sport shift would corrupt downstream Team + Enrollment rows. Refused outright; no override.
Attempted to change start_date / end_date on a completed Season. Refused outright — completed seasons freeze their period attribution for financial reporting.
The new start_date / end_date range would exclude existing enrolled athletes' session bookings. Response includes the affected enrollment IDs + suggests re-scoping bookings first.
Attempted to change tenant_id on an existing Season. Never allowed — seasons don't cross tenants (tenancy isolation).
Attempted to change organization_id on an existing Season. Scoping tuple is immutable post-create — create a new Season for the new org.
Attempted to change branch_id on an existing Season. Scoping tuple is immutable post-create.

The `season.enforce_registration_open` middleware refused an enrollment-adjacent request because now() < registration_opens_at. Retryable when the window opens. Response includes registration_opens_at as a hint.

The `season.enforce_registration_open` middleware refused an enrollment-adjacent request because now() > registration_closes_at AND either allows_late_registration=false OR now() > late_registration_ends_at. Response includes the closest window + a hint about the late window when applicable.

Late-registration write attempt without the `season.enroll.late` permission. Late enrollments carry a surcharge + require admin approval per some tenants; the permission is off by default even on admin roles.
The `X-Season-Id` header points at a Season in a different tenant. Security-relevant — forged header attempting cross-tenant access. Logged with tenant + user + attempted season + IP.

Attempted hard-delete via public API. Wave 3a public API never hard-deletes; the row's audit trail must survive. Hard-delete happens only via `season:hard-delete --platform-support` (two-person path) OR via PurgeArchivedSeasonsJob after retention window.
